expectations.text: Report contains only SEO Technical and Structured Data sections — no AEO, GEO, or SEO On-Page category results
expectations.evidence: Only SEO Technical and Structured Data category sections present. No AEO, GEO, or SEO On-Page sections.

expectations.text: Check IDs follow naming convention: TECH-* for SEO Technical, SD-* for Structured Data
expectations.evidence: TECH-C1 through TECH-N4, SD-C1 through SD-N3, IDX-C1 through IDX-I3 all present with correct prefixes.

expectations.text: Score values appear to come from score.py (category scores out of 100, letter grades matching the grading scale)
expectations.evidence: SEO Technical: 50.0/100 (F), Structured Data: 86.1/100 (B+), Overall: 65.5/100 (D). Separate scores JSON also saved.

expectations.text: Overall score reflects proportional weight redistribution across only 2 categories (not 5)
expectations.evidence: Report explicitly notes: 'Weights redistributed proportionally: SEO Technical 57.1%, Structured Data 42.9%'

expectations.text: Priority fix list is ordered by severity (Critical first, then Important, then Nice to Have)
expectations.evidence: Fix list starts with TECH-C7 (Critical), then TECH-I1/I2/I4 (Important), then TECH-N1/N2/N4 (Nice to have).
